nasb.text: Concerning evil, both hands do it well. The prince asks, also the judge, for a bribe, And a great man speaks the desire of his soul; So they weave it together.

esv.text: Their hands are on what is evil, to do it well; the prince and the judge ask for a bribe, and the great man utters the evil desire of his soul; thus they weave it together.

cnv.text: 他們雙手善於作惡， 官長和審判官都要求報酬； 達官貴人說出心裡的慾望； 他們歪曲了一切。

ccb.text: 他们善于作恶。 领袖和审判官索要贿赂， 显贵袒露心中的恶欲，朋比为奸。
